description: Locked inputs for the private Oracle JDBC runtime bundle. This is the SOURCE-OF-TRUTH manifest consumed by `npm run prepare:oracle-runtime`. Real jars/JRE are acquired out-of-band (build-time network is blocked) and staged into a source directory; the prepare step verifies each artifact against the sha256 recorded here, stages it under resources/oracle-jdbc/, and regenerates checksums.json. Empty sha256 values MUST be filled from the official vendor download before a production bundle is cut (see docs/ai/ORACLE_JDBC_RUNTIME_MATRIX.md).

java.vendor: Eclipse Temurin (or an equivalent redistribution-permitted OpenJDK)
java.notes: A private, jlink-trimmed JRE staged as resources/oracle-jdbc/runtime/. Never uses system Java or JAVA_HOME/PATH.

tls.scope: Thin-driver TLS (TCPS) with optional Oracle Wallet; wallet path supplied per connection profile, never bundled.

artifacts.notes: Directory tree with bin/java(.exe). sha256 here is over a stable archive of the tree if provided; otherwise per-file hashes land in checksums.json.

artifacts.version: REQUIRED — record the exact vendored version (e.g. 23.x)
REQUIRED — match the ojdbc release train

licenses.name: Oracle Free Use Terms and Conditions / OTN License (confirm the exact terms shipped with the vendored jars)
Eclipse Temurin / OpenJDK license + THIRD-PARTY notices (confirm the exact terms shipped with the JRE)
